steps.title: Look for a decline
steps.content: The researcher claims that some lakes had a decline in ice duration between the early 1980s and the mid-2000s. A valid example must compare those periods and show fewer ice days later.

steps.title: Check the comparison
steps.content: A and D give single-period facts that do not establish a decline. C says Lake Neusiedl had more days later, which contradicts the claim. The matching example shows Oulujärvi had fewer ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81. The answer is B.
